movies.title: Sonic The Hedgehog
movies.description: Sonic the Hedgehog (2020) follows Sonic, a super-speedy blue hedgehog, as he teams up with a small-town sheriff to escape the government and stop Dr. Robotnik from using his powers for evil.

movies.title: Sonic The Hedgehog 2
movies.description: Sonic the Hedgehog 2 (2022) follows Sonic as he teams up with Tails to stop Dr. Robotnik and Knuckles from obtaining a powerful emerald that could destroy civilizations.

movies.title: Avengers Endgame
movies.description: Avengers: Endgame (2019) follows the remaining Avengers (Iron Man, Captain America, Thor, Black Widow, Hulk, and Hawkeye) as they join forces with their former allies to undo the devastation caused by Thanos, a powerful cosmic warlord who wiped out half of all life in the universe. Through time travel, sacrifice, and one final epic battle, they fight to restore everything they lost and bring hope back to the universe.

movies.title: The Lorax
movies.description: The Lorax (2012) follows Ted, a young boy who seeks to win the affection of a girl by discovering the story of the Once-ler, a mysterious man who destroyed the environment, and the Lorax, a guardian who speaks for the trees.

movies.title: Avengers Infinity War
movies.description: Avengers: Infinity War (2018) follows the Avengers and their allies as they try to stop Thanos, a powerful warlord collecting all six Infinity Stones to wipe out half of all life in the universe.

movies.title: Ant-Man and the Wasp: Quantumania
movies.description: Ant-Man and the Wasp: Quantumania (2023) follows Scott Lang and his family as they are pulled into the Quantum Realm, where they must face Kang the Conqueror, a powerful ruler threatening the multiverse, while trying to find a way back home.

movies.title: Barbie
movies.description: Barbie (2023) follows Barbie and Ken as they leave the perfect world of Barbieland and enter the real world, where Barbie begins an unexpected journey of self-discovery after questioning her identity and place in the world.

movies.title: Beetlejuice
movies.description: Beetlejuice (1988) follows a recently deceased couple who become ghosts in their own home and try to scare away the new owners, but accidentally summon Beetlejuice, a chaotic spirit whose interference causes even more trouble.

movies.title: Beetlejuice Beetlejuice
movies.description: Beetlejuice Beetlejuice (2024) follows Lydia Deetz and her family as they are pulled back into chaos when Beetlejuice returns after a new portal to the afterlife is accidentally opened, causing trouble across both the living and ghost worlds.

movies.title: Black Panther
movies.description: Black Panther (2018) follows T’Challa as he returns to Wakanda after his father’s death to take the throne, but he is challenged by a powerful enemy from the past that threatens both Wakanda and the world.

movies.title: Coco
movies.description: Coco (2017) follows Miguel, a young boy who dreams of becoming a musician, as he accidentally enters the Land of the Dead on Día de los Muertos, where he uncovers his family’s hidden history and learns the importance of remembering loved ones.

movies.title: Coraline
movies.description: Coraline (2009) follows Coraline, a curious girl who discovers a hidden door to a seemingly perfect alternate world, but soon realizes it hides a dark and dangerous secret.

movies.title: The Addams Family
movies.description: The Addams Family (1991) follows the eccentric Addams family as they welcome a man claiming to be their long-lost Uncle Fester, but the family soon begins to suspect he may be part of a plot to steal their fortune.

movies.title: The Garfield Movie
movies.description: The Garfield Movie (2024) follows Garfield as his lazy indoor life is turned upside down when he reunites with his long-lost father and gets pulled into a wild adventure and high-stakes heist.

movies.title: Garfield
movies.description: Garfield (2004) follows Garfield, a lazy, sarcastic cat who lives a comfortable life until his owner adopts a dog named Odie, forcing Garfield into a rivalry that turns into an unexpected rescue adventure.

movies.title: Vemon
movies.description: Venom (2018) follows journalist Eddie Brock as he bonds with an alien symbiote named Venom, gaining powerful abilities but also struggling to control the dangerous creature inside him while facing a corrupt corporation experimenting with other symbiotes.

movies.title: Vemon Let There Be Carnage
movies.description: Venom: Let There Be Carnage (2021) follows Eddie Brock and Venom as they struggle with their unstable partnership while facing Cletus Kasady, a deadly serial killer who becomes the host of the violent symbiote Carnage, leading to a destructive showdown.

movies.title: Wreck-It Ralph
movies.description: Wreck-It Ralph (2012) follows Ralph, a video game villain who grows tired of always being the “bad guy” and leaves his game to prove he can be a hero, but he accidentally causes a major threat that puts the entire arcade in danger.

movies.title: Ralph Breaks the Internet
movies.description: Ralph Breaks the Internet (2018) follows Ralph and Vanellope as they enter the Internet to find a replacement part for her broken game, but their journey tests their friendship as Vanellope discovers a new world she may want to stay in.

movies.title: The Lego Movie
movies.description: The LEGO Movie (2014) follows Emmet, an ordinary construction worker who is mistaken for “The Special” and joins a group of Master Builders on a quest to stop Lord Business from freezing the LEGO world forever.

movies.title: The Lego Movie 2
movies.description: The LEGO Movie 2: The Second Part (2019) follows Emmet and his friends as they try to save Bricksburg after it is invaded by LEGO DUPLO aliens, leading them on an adventure across strange new worlds while testing their friendships and creativity.

movies.title: The Lego Batman Movie
movies.description: The LEGO Batman Movie (2017) follows Batman as he tries to save Gotham from the Joker, but is forced to learn teamwork when he accidentally adopts a young orphan and must work with allies to stop a massive villain takeover.

movies.title: Pixels
movies.description: Pixels (2015) follows a group of former arcade champions who are recruited by the government to fight alien invaders who attack Earth using giant versions of classic video games.

movies.title: Hidden Figures
movies.description: Hidden Figures (2016) follows three brilliant African-American women at NASA who play a crucial role in launching astronaut John Glenn into orbit, overcoming racial and gender barriers along the way.

movies.title: Home Alone
movies.description: Home Alone (1990) follows Kevin, a young boy accidentally left behind when his family goes on vacation, as he defends his home from two burglars using clever traps.
related: Home Alone 2: Lost in New York

movies.title: Home Alone 2: Lost in New York
movies.description: Home Alone 2: Lost in New York (1992) follows Kevin as he gets separated from his family again and ends up in New York City, where he must outsmart the same burglars while navigating the big city on his own.

movies.title: Hotel Transylvania
movies.description: Hotel Transylvania (2012) follows Dracula, who runs a hidden hotel for monsters, as he tries to protect his daughter from the human world when an ordinary boy accidentally discovers the hotel.

movies.title: Hotel Transylvania 2
movies.description: Hotel Transylvania 2 (2015) follows Dracula as he worries that his half-human grandson might not be a monster, leading him to secretly put the boy through “monster training” while his parents are away.

movies.title: Hotel Transylvania 3: Summer Vacation
movies.description: Hotel Transylvania 3: Summer Vacation (2018) follows Dracula and his monster friends as they take a cruise vacation, where Dracula unexpectedly falls for the ship’s mysterious captain, unaware she has a dangerous secret.

movies.title: Hotel Transylvania: Transformania
movies.description: Hotel Transylvania: Transformania (2022) follows Dracula and his monster family after a failed experiment turns them into humans while turning Johnny into a monster, forcing them to travel to reverse the transformation before it becomes permanent.

movies.title: IT
movies.description: It (2017) follows a group of kids in the town of Derry who band together as “The Losers Club” to confront Pennywise, a terrifying shape-shifting clown that feeds on fear and preys on children every 27 years.

movies.title: Scream
movies.description: Scream (1996) follows Sidney Prescott and her friends as they are stalked by a masked killer known as Ghostface, who terrorizes their town while following deadly horror movie “rules.”

movies.title: Scream 2
movies.description: Scream 2 (1997) follows Sidney Prescott in college as a new Ghostface killer emerges, recreating the original Woodsboro murders and targeting her and her friends once again.

movies.title: Scream 3
movies.description: Scream 3 (2000) follows Sidney Prescott as she is drawn into the set of a Hollywood movie based on the Woodsboro murders, where a new Ghostface begins killing cast and crew members.

movies.title: Scream 4
movies.description: Scream 4 (2011) follows Sidney Prescott returning to Woodsboro for her book tour, only for a new Ghostface killer to appear, targeting a new generation while repeating the same deadly patterns of the past.

movies.title: Scream 5
movies.description: Scream (2022) follows a new Ghostface killer in Woodsboro who targets a group of teenagers connected to the original killings, drawing Sidney Prescott, Gale Weathers, and Dewey back into the deadly game once again.
